_meta.description: Production incidents, persistent bugs, and security events. Seeded from open GitHub issues + npm audit on first run.

incidents.title: Silent failures in maIntelligencePopulation.ts swallow DB insert errors
OAuth base-URL fallback silently returns localhost:5000 in prod if env vars missing

~30 open unmerged routine PRs accumulating; issue #253 reports routine duplication (4 redundant three-hat PRs). Operator merge/triage required to break the loop.
